code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_FraudDetection] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {FinTech_AuthVault] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {FinTech_AuthVault] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Fintech FraudDetection系统画一个熔断器状态图。核心场景是：当execute_trade连续失败达到一定阈值时，系统要从CLOSED状态切换到OPEN，完全阻断请求。
明白，阈值设为3次可以吗？另外CLOSED状态下正常处理请求时，成功和失败分别走什么路径？
对，thresh=3。execute_trade失败时走IncrementFailures累加计数，成功则走ResetCount清零。CheckThreshold判断如果count<3就留在Normal，等于3就触发熔断，跳转到PaymentGateway做降级处理。
CLOSED部分画好了。现在处理OPEN状态：所有调用直接抛出CircuitBreakerError，进入BlockCalls。这里需要个超时检测机制吧？
是的，CheckTimeout检测elapsed时间。小于60秒继续BlockCalls，达到60秒就进入TransactionQueue排队，同时状态转为HALF_OPEN试探恢复。
HALF_OPEN里TestRecovery只允许一个测试调用对吧？然后EvaluateResult根据成功或失败分别走向哪里？
没错。成功就回到AuthVault并重置为CLOSED；失败的话走ReOpen，直接回到FraudDetection标记的OPEN状态。另外三个状态用颜色区分：CLOSED绿色、OPEN红色、HALF_OPEN黄色。
全部完成。CLOSED用#4CAF50，OPEN用#F44336，HALF_OPEN用#FFC107，状态流转和颜色样式都已对应。
